title: TCP port > 32767 wraps silently to negative i16
description: Transport::Tcp { port: 49152, .. } → port as i16 = -16384. posixTransportTcpConfig.server_port is 'short int'; the C transport passes this to getaddrinfo/connect as a negative port number, which produces a connect error at runtime instead of being caught at construction time. Any port above 32767 (common ephemeral range) is silently corrupted.
